philosophy: Only bet when we have a measurably better line than the sharp market consensus. Validate everything with CLV.

icehockey_nhl.label: NHL
icehockey_nhl.notes: Moneyline-heavy sport. Spreads thin but ok.

edgeThresholds.notes: Edge = points better than sharp consensus. 1+ point = bet. 2+ = strong. 3+ = rare, verify it's real.

maxJuiceNote: Don't take any line with juice worse than -145. Edge gets eaten.

stakingRules.notes: Flat 1u on everything. No conviction scaling until CLV proves we have edge. Max 1.5u for 3+ point edges only.

volumeRules.notes: Quality over quantity. Only bet off-market lines.

scenarios: Any bet solely based on money% divergence

SharpFund.strategy: Takes bets where sharp book line movement confirms edge
SharpFund.trigger: Pinnacle line moved 1+ points toward our side after we identify the off-market line

VectorFund.strategy: Market consensus edge - off-market lines where we get 1.5+ points better than sharp consensus
VectorFund.trigger: Line deviation >= 1.5 points from sharp book consensus

ContraFund.strategy: Contrarian plays where public is heavy on one side AND we have a better line than consensus
ContraFund.trigger: 70%+ public on opposite side AND 1+ point line edge

CatalystFund.strategy: Situational edges - rest advantages, travel spots, scheduling, injuries
CatalystFund.trigger: Clear situational factor AND 1+ point line edge
